programName: Phoenix Water Service Line Replacement Plan
subsidyType: city-managed full replacement when a lead or galvanized requiring replacement line is identified
publicSideCovered: yes city-managed replacement process includes the public side
privateSideCovered: yes full line from the city meter box to the house connection is replaced at no cost
propertyRules: customers with identified lead or galvanized requiring replacement lines are contacted directly and must sign a replacement contract
contractorRules: city staff or contractors schedule and complete the replacement
